heading: Exclusive right to name
label: 140304 Exclusive right to name
text: The corporation and its area, State, and local chapters have the exclusive right to use the name “The Military Chaplains Association of the United States of America”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14030436:316., .Sept. 20, 1950, ch. 956, § 664 Stat. 869The words “sole and”, “to have and”, and “in carrying out its purpose” are omitted as unnecessary.
